Abstract

scTenifoldKnk is a virtual knockout method for single-cell RNA-seq analysis. The method starts from wild-type expression profiles, constructs single-cell gene regulatory networks, denoises them with tensor decomposition, removes the target gene virtually, aligns wild-type and perturbed manifolds, and reports differential regulation signals for downstream interpretation.

Methods

The core workflow assumes a WT count matrix with genes by cells, preservation of raw counts, and explicit target-gene selection. The paper distinguishes the core WT-only virtual knockout path from manuscript validation branches that compare real WT and knockout experiments.
